allow: Bash(python -c "from docling.document_converter import DocumentConverter; import inspect; print\([x for x in dir\(__import__\('docling.document_converter', fromlist=['*']\)\) if 'Word' in x or 'Docx' in x or 'word' in x or 'docx' in x]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('build script:', d.get\('scripts',{}\).get\('build',''\)\); print\('electron-build:', d.get\('scripts',{}\).get\('electron:build',''\)\);  print\('pack:', d.get\('scripts',{}\).get\('pack',''\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':', v\) for k,v in d.get\('scripts',{}\).items\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('build', {}\), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'md' in k.lower\(\) or 'editor' in k.lower\(\) or 'codemirror' in k.lower\(\) or 'uiw' in k.lower\(\)]")
